questions.question: Does isRenderableImageMimeType return true for all 7 Chromium-native formats (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, AVIF, BMP, SVG) and false for non-renderable image types (HEIC, HEIF, TIFF)?
questions.actionable_check: Read RENDERABLE_IMAGE_TYPES set in media-parser.ts and verify it contains exactly the 7 correct MIME types. Run the isRenderableImageMimeType tests.
questions.pass_criteria: 7 renderable types in the set, HEIC/HEIF/TIFF excluded, tests pass

questions.question: Does MediaAttachments use isRenderableImageMimeType (not isImageMimeType) for the inline render vs download link decision?
questions.actionable_check: Read the isImage assignment in MediaAttachments.tsx and verify it calls isRenderableImageMimeType.
questions.pass_criteria: MediaAttachments imports and uses isRenderableImageMimeType for rendering decisions

questions.question: Is isImageMimeType still exported and unchanged for backward compatibility?
questions.actionable_check: Read isImageMimeType in media-parser.ts, verify it still uses startsWith('image/') and is exported.
questions.pass_criteria: Function unchanged, still exported, still returns true for all image/* types

mandatory_questions.question: Do all existing tests pass without regressions?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Run npm test and verify all test suites pass with 0 failures.

mandatory_questions.question: Do existing MediaAttachments.test.ts tests still pass (these use isImageMimeType for assertions)?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Run MediaAttachments tests and verify they pass.
